name: Glastopf Analytics
description: Easy honeypot statistics. Tool: https://github.com/katkad/Glastopf-Analytics. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #635 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Glastopf Analytics output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
